name: Green Farm Initiative
shortDescription: Teaching sustainable farming techniques to rural communities
problem: Smallholder farmers in rural areas face low yields due to outdated farming methods and limited access to modern techniques
solution: We provide training workshops, improved seedlings, and market linkage services to boost productivity and income

testimonials.name: Jacintha Omondi
testimonials.quote: This project changed my life. From KES 15,000 to KES 80,000 monthly income!

testimonials.name: Peter Kipchoge
testimonials.quote: The training was practical and immediately applicable. Highly recommended!

name: TechED - Digital Literacy
shortDescription: Bringing digital skills to underserved secondary schools
problem: Students in resource-limited schools lack exposure to technology and digital skills needed for modern careers
solution: We conduct free coding bootcamps, provide refurbished laptops, and develop digital learning modules for schools

testimonials.name: Mr. Samuel Kipchoge
testimonials.quote: Our students now have real career prospects. Thank you Enactus!

name: Aqua Pure Water Solutions
shortDescription: Providing clean water to communities through sustainable filtration
problem: Communities lack access to clean water, leading to waterborne diseases
solution: Installed bio-filtration systems powered by solar energy, reducing water treatment costs by 80%

testimonials.name: Grace Kipkemei
testimonials.quote: Water-borne diseases have dropped significantly. Our children are healthier!

name: Women Artisan Hub
shortDescription: Empowering women through e-commerce and craft entrepreneurship
problem: Women artisans struggle to reach wider markets and receive fair prices
solution: Built e-commerce platform, provided business training, and facilitated partnerships with retailers

testimonials.name: Amina Hassan
testimonials.quote: I went from selling in the market to shipping nationwide. Incredible transformation!

name: Environmental Conservation
shortDescription: Reforestation and ecosystem restoration in Lake Victoria region
problem: Deforestation and wetland degradation threaten biodiversity and increase flood risks
solution: Large-scale tree planting campaigns, wetland restoration, and environmental education programs

testimonials.name: Chief Mwalimu
testimonials.quote: Our forests are coming back. Our children will have a better future!
